character.name: Roscoe Full-Fifth Fool-Fists
character.skill: Acrobatics +6, Athletics +6, Deception +17, Insight +7, Intimidation +11, Perception +7, Performance +17, Persuasion +17, Survival +7
character.prof: Light Armor, Simple Weapons, Hand Crossbows, Longswords, Rapiers, Shortswords, Musical Instruments

trait.name: Magic Resistance (Satyr)
trait.text: Advantage on saving throws against spells and magical effects.

trait.name: Fey Creature (Satyr)
trait.text: Your creature type is fey. Immune to Hold Person, Charm Person, Dominate Person, and other humanoid-only effects.

trait.name: Mirthful Leaps (Satyr)
trait.text: Add 1d8 to any long or high jump distance.

trait.name: UNSETTLING WORDS
trait.text: Bonus Action. Spend 1 Bardic Inspiration. Target within 60ft subtracts your Inspiration die (d20) from their NEXT SAVING THROW. COMBO STARTER.

trait.name: Silver Tongue
trait.text: Treat rolls of 9 or lower on Persuasion/Deception as 10. Your floor = 27.

trait.name: Unfailing Inspiration
trait.text: Ally uses Inspiration and fails? They keep the die.

trait.name: Universal Speech
trait.text: Action, 1/LR or spell slot. Up to 5 creatures understand you for 1 hour.

trait.name: Infectious Inspiration
trait.text: Reaction. Ally succeeds with Inspiration? Give another ally Inspiration (5/LR).

trait.name: Bardic Inspiration (d20)
trait.text: 5/short rest. Bonus action, 60ft. Ally adds d20 to attack/check/save within 10 min. (d20 from Soulstring Banjo)

trait.name: Jack of All Trades
trait.text: +3 to ability checks without proficiency (including initiative and Counterspell).

trait.name: Countercharm
trait.text: Action. 1 minute. You and allies within 30ft have advantage vs frightened/charmed.

trait.name: Song of Rest (d12)
trait.text: Short rest: allies spending Hit Dice regain extra 1d12 HP.

trait.name: Magical Secrets
trait.text: L10: Counterspell, Find Greater Steed. L14: Haste, Aura of Vitality.

trait.name: Soulstring Banjo (Artifact)
trait.text: Inspiration = d20. Crescendo 1/day: 60ft 8d8 thunder DC19 stun. Soul Resonance 1/day. Harmonic Shield: adv vs charm/fear/psychic. 2/day each: Fly, Invisibility, Levitate, Prot Energy, Cure 3rd, Dispel.

trait.name: Resonance Key
trait.text: Amplified Inspiration 1/day: d20+10. Amplified Crescendo 1/day: 120ft 12d8 stun 2 rounds. Fifth speaks words.
